activities_projects.title: Missing Value Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Find missing values using mean formula
steps: Write a dataset with one missing value
Given the mean of the dataset
Use algebra to calculate the missing number

activities_projects.title: Mean Grid Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Create a grid where rows, columns, and diagonals have same mean
steps: Ensure average of every row, column, and diagonal equals 10

activities_projects.title: Data Manipulation Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how multiplying values affects mean

activities_projects.title: Large Dataset Median Study
activities_projects.objective: Find median in large data collections
steps: Test how removing values affects median

activities_projects.title: Data Story Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study sleep patterns across ages using graph data
steps: Identify age groups with highest sleep time

activities_projects.title: Statistical Inference Task
activities_projects.objective: Determine whether statements about mean or median are always true
steps: Test statements about mean and median
Explain whether they are always, sometimes, or never true

activities_projects.title: Real Data Research Project
steps: Collect monthly rainfall or temperature data
